nodes.label: AI as formatting troubleshooting partner
nodes.grounding_span: I occasionally use AI to find out how to properly edit documents in Microsoft Word and PDFs

nodes.label: AI solution completeness and immediacy
nodes.grounding_span: I normally ask for a complete solution immediately

nodes.label: AI role expansion beyond current tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI role limited to current formatting challenges
nodes.grounding_span: I do not see the role of AI at my job expanding beyond its current role

nodes.label: Professional document quality and customer satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: They need to look great for receipt by the customer

nodes.label: Task completion and relief from effort
nodes.grounding_span: Just having that completed was relieving

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as formatting helper
nodes.grounding_span: It gave me tips on how to shrink the images to make the document look neater

nodes.label: Contentment with current limited AI role
nodes.grounding_span: I do not see the role of AI at my job expanding beyond its current role

nodes.label: Iterative troubleshooting — starts with complete solution then shifts to step-by-step
nodes.grounding_span: I normally ask for a complete solution immediately. However, when I troubleshoot further, I normally start asking the AI questions on a step-by-step basis

nodes.label: Self-reliant problem diagnosis — understands problem before seeking AI help
nodes.grounding_span: I generally understand the problem itself, so I ask the AI model directly what I can do to fix the document
